name: my-marketplace
description: Local marketplace — personal overlay on the AIDD framework

plugins.name: overcode
plugins.description: Extends the AIDD framework: dig, harvest, reconcile-normative, data-optimize, web-optimize, seo-optimize, behave, control (gouvernance de la suite de tests, pondérée par la phase de projet : décision de tier, audit des tests sans valeur, manques classés par risque, config d'outillage, état des lieux, alignement du document de stratégie), status. Alias: rechallenge, endtask, bump-plugin, previously, smarten, skillconf, weeklyemail, gitit, mirror, codex-vision.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Design system funnel — 5 verbs: define · destructure · adjust (freeze 3-layer contract) · enforce (portable linter + sc-* pivot + 3 gates) · diffuse (elements under gate + sc-* pivot). Adds copycat (per-page mockup→contract reconciliation agent + Python fidelity oracle: machine CLOSED/OPEN verdict, structural completeness scan, coverage guard, deviation-ledger with id + registry validation, ledger-unused detection, active-frame isolation, check_text per-target P7+P11, collections LCS-diff P8+P12, Windows stdout P10, collection-level ack P13, visual-diff companion P14). Adds config-gen.py (P15): auto-derive oracle config from contract — components.json BEM selectors + tokens.json prop groups → targets+props+breakpoints, with oracle hints per component. Breaking: replaces 9 legacy skills.

plugins.name: game-writer
plugins.description: Écriture de contenu narratif pour le jeu vidéo (8-MINE) : bank d'assets, timelines Dialogic (dialogic-draft, dialogic-review). Pendant technique : sc-godot. (ex-gamedesign)

plugins.name: sc-godot
plugins.description: Godot/GDScript ecosystem (squelette) : sniff, audit, improve, legacy, teach — partie technique du jeu vidéo, pendant de game-writer. Skills à porter (template sc-*).

plugins.name: sc-php
plugins.description: PHP ecosystem skills: sniff, audit, improve, legacy, teach. WordPress/Laravel/Symfony perf pivots, HTMX hybrid, Eloquent + Doctrine data pivots. design-bridge: réceptacle pivot design (linter PHP/WP natif + block pattern WP). builder-coverage: gate WYSIWYG FSE — couverture (chaque composant de page a une pattern éditable) + organisation (patterns rangées par rôle de section, taxonomie généralisable), comme un builder Divi/Elementor.

plugins.name: sc-js
plugins.description: JavaScript ecosystem: sniff (Nuxt/Vue/SvelteKit/Alpine/Vite/Astro), audit, improve (8 capability pivots), legacy (Vue 2→3/ESM/TS), teach + SvelteKit/Svelte stores/Biome pivots + Prisma/Drizzle/TypeORM/Mongoose/GraphQL/tRPC data pivots. design-bridge: réceptacle pivot design (règle ESLint + composant Vue 3/React). wp-blocks: round-trip de validité des blocs Gutenberg (Playwright/éditeur) pour markup FSE généré hors éditeur.

plugins.name: sc-css
plugins.description: CSS ecosystem skills: sniff (architecture + stack), audit (spécificité, code mort, magic numbers, a11y CSS), improve (custom properties, cascade layers, modernisation), legacy (float→flex/grid, px→rem, préfixes→standard, vars Sass→custom props), teach. design-bridge: tokens.json → custom properties CSS, components.json → BEM stylesheets en @layer.

plugins.name: sc-tiers
plugins.description: Third-party SaaS consumption rules: Firebase coding + Firebase/Supabase/DynamoDB/Hasura data pivots.

plugins.name: sc-python
plugins.description: Python ecosystem: two-tier sniff (pivot model), audit, improve, legacy, teach. Perf pivots: Django, DRF, Celery, FastAPI, httpx, Flask (gap). Data pivots: Django ORM, SQLAlchemy, HuggingFace datasets. Capability pivots: Python idioms, spaCy NLP.

plugins.name: sc-rust
plugins.description: Rust ecosystem: two-tier sniff (pivot model), audit, Axum/Actix-web perf pivots + SQLx/Diesel data pivots.

plugins.name: obs
plugins.description: Personal Obsidian notes management — Pro project lifecycle, email triage (mail), the Documents/ organiser tree (cache-based: index, check, fix, sort, judge, destinations), research (documentary research and terminology extraction), extract-pdf (raw source ingestion).
